subtasks.description: Evaluate emergency access request for u_9981 (senior-engineer) to db-payments-primary against access control and incident response policies. Determine if the request meets policy criteria for temporary elevated access during P1 incidents.

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy_action subtask (mid tier) because this is an explicit access control governance decision. The request asks for policy evaluation against rules governing emergency access, incident response scope, and role-based permissions. Mid tier is appropriate because it involves multi-signal reasoning: verifying the user's role, the incident severity (P1), the target resource (production database), and cross-referencing multiple applicable policies (emergency access, incident response, database access control). Small tier would be insufficient for this multi-policy reasoning. One subtask is sufficient—all policy evaluation happens in a single call. No additional subtasks needed as the output is a governance decision (approve/deny with conditions), not data reconciliation or tool orchestration."

output.reason: Senior-engineer u_9981 has an active P1 incident ticket (INC-20241215-0042) satisfying POL-501. POL-502 dual approval is waived under declared P1 exception. Access permitted subject to POL-503 mandatory logging and 24-hour post-incident review.
applied_constraints: Access scoped to incident INC-20241215-0042 duration
All read_write operations must be audit-logged
Mandatory post-access review within 24 hours per POL-503
P1 incident status must remain active; access revoked if downgraded
